creator: ale@FreeBSD.org
text:
Bryan Drewery ha scritto:
> However, this does not work in this case as the problem is purely in
> 'make install' phase. Poudriere does not install RUN_DEPENDS before
> 'install' as the port should build fine without RUN_DEPENDS being
> installed (per bapt@).

I don't know poudriere, but bsd.port.mk checks that RUN_DEPENDS (and
*not* BUILD_DEPENDS [absurd imho]) are installed for do-install, so the
behavior is not coherent between the twos.

ioncube should probably use PHP_VER instead of PHP_VERSION.

-- 
Alex Dupre
